Document Gov Docs N7955303 SPECTAL POLITICAL COMMITTEE GENERAL 36th meeting held on ASSEMBLY Monday, 27 November 1978 THIRTY-THIRD SESSION at 3 p.m. Official Records * New York VERBATIM RECORD (PARTIAL) OF THE 36TH MEETING** Chairman: Mr. PIZA-ESCALANTE (Costa Rica) CONTENTS AGENDA ITEM 126: ESTABLISHMENT OF AN AGENCY OR A DEPARTMENT OF THE UNITED NATIONS FOR UNDERTAKING, CO-ORDINATING AND DISSEMINATING THE RESULTS OF RESEARCH INTO UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS AND RELATED PHENOMENA ** Circulated pursuant to a decision taken at the 36th meeting. The full record of the meeting has been issued as document A/33/SPC/SR. 36 * This record 1s subyect to correction Corrections should be incorporated in a copy of Distr. GENERAL the record and should be sent within one week of the date of publicanon to the Chief, Official Records Editing Section, room A-3550. A/SPC/33/PV.36 6 March 1979 Corrections
